book.title: Frankenstein
book.author: Mary Shelley
book.source_license: Public Domain in the United States
book.commercial_use_evidence: Public-domain source evidence requires owner/legal review before commercial public release.

details.raw_text_preview: Chapter 1  I am by birth a Genevese; and my family is one of the most distinguished of that republic. My ancestors had been for many years counsellors and syndics; and my father had filled several public situations with honour and reputatio
details.raw_text:
Chapter 1

I am by birth a Genevese; and my family is one of the most distinguished of
that republic. My ancestors had been for many years counsellors and syndics;
and my father had filled several public situations with honour and reputation.

Chapter 2

When I had attained the age of seventeen, my parents resolved that I should
become a student at the university of Ingolstadt. I had hitherto attended the
schools of Geneva; but my father thought it necessary, for the completion of my
education, that I should be made acquainted with other customs than those of my
native country.

evidence.dataset_license_notes: Official model card lists Apache-licensed model/weights and named CC BY training data, but voice/speaker-rights approval for Earnalism use still requires owner/legal review.

evidence.voice_rights_summary: Voice list is documented upstream, but Earnalism has not completed speaker-rights, voice provenance, or owner approval review.
